integrations.name: Anthropic
integrations.description: Powers the default agent runtime. Required for Claude-based agents.

integrations.name: Gemini
integrations.description: Powers Gemini-based agents. Required for Google AI model support.

integrations.name: Discord
integrations.description: Enables agents to send and receive messages in Discord servers.

integrations.name: Slack
integrations.description: Enables agents to post messages and respond to events in Slack workspaces.

integrations.name: Email
integrations.description: Enables agents to send and receive email via IMAP and SMTP.

integrations.name: Calendar
integrations.description: Allows agents to read and create calendar events via Google Calendar.

integrations.name: GitHub
integrations.description: Gives agents access to GitHub repositories, issues, and pull requests.

integrations.name: Supabase
integrations.description: Syncs agent data to a Supabase project for remote persistence.

integrations.name: Vercel
integrations.description: Enables agents to trigger and monitor Vercel deployments.

integrations.name: Tailscale
integrations.description: Connects agents to your Tailscale network for secure remote access.
